# We Specialize in Providing Excellent Tree Services

Smelser's Tree Service LLC in Winchester, VA, takes pride in providing high-quality services for all your tree care needs. We have you covered from emergency storm work, tree removal and trimming, stump grinding, woodchip delivery, and firewood sales. Our experienced professionals are equipped to ensure your trees are properly cared for and maintained. We understand that trees are an essential part of your property's landscape and can enhance the beauty of your surroundings. That's why we are committed to providing exceptional services that are tailored to meet your specific needs. Whether you need a one-time service or ongoing maintenance, Smelser's Tree Service LLC is here to help.

[Storm Cleanup Services — Cross Junction, VA — Smelser's Tree Service LLC](https://www.smelserstreeservice.net/tree-cleanup-after-storms)

[Button](https://www.smelserstreeservice.net/tree-cleanup-after-storms)

## Storm Cleanup Services

When a storm hits, it can leave your yard in disarray. That's where our storm cleanup services come in. Our team of experts will remove from any structures or vehicles, and clear away fallen trees, branches, and debris to make your yard look beautiful again in no time. We understand the urgency of storm cleanup and will work quickly and efficiently to ensure your safety.

[Learn More](https://www.smelserstreeservice.net/tree-cleanup-after-storms)

[Firewood Services — Cross Junction, VA — Smelser's Tree Service LLC](https://www.smelserstreeservice.net/turn-trees-into-firewood)

[Button](https://www.smelserstreeservice.net/turn-trees-into-firewood)

## Firewood Services

Don't let old man winter keep you cold. Our firewood services will deliver you top-quality wood to your home. Our firewood is perfect for heating your home or adding ambiance to your backyard fire pit.

[Learn More](https://www.smelserstreeservice.net/turn-trees-into-firewood)

[Tree Removal — Cross Junction, VA — Smelser's Tree Service LLC](https://www.smelserstreeservice.net/removal-of-trees)

[Button](https://www.smelserstreeservice.net/removal-of-trees)

## [Tree Removal](https://www.smelserstreeservice.net/removal-of-trees)

If you have a tree that needs to be removed, our team of experts can handle it safely and efficiently. We can remove trees of any size without causing damage to your property.

[Learn More](https://www.smelserstreeservice.net/removal-of-trees)

[Wood-Chipping Services — Cross Junction, VA — Smelser's Tree Service LLC](https://www.smelserstreeservice.net/turn-trees-into-woodchips)

[Button](https://www.smelserstreeservice.net/turn-trees-into-woodchips)

## Woodchips Delivery

When spring hits and its time to freshen up those gardens or landscape our woodchip delivery service is a phone call away to meet your needs.

[Learn More](https://www.smelserstreeservice.net/turn-trees-into-woodchips)

## [Stump Grinding](https://www.smelserstreeservice.net/grinding-and-removing-stumps)

If you have an unsightly stump in your yard, our stump grinding services can remove it quickly and efficiently. We use specialized equipment to grind the stump to below ground level, leaving your yard neat and tidy.
